title: Reset Device - Restore Defaults - Restore - Yes
scenario: Verify that resetting a device to factory defaults restores all settings to their default values via the Reset Device tab in Lens App.
steps: Start Lens App with a headset connected.
Change all settings to non-default values.
Navigate to the Reset Device tab.
Tap OK to return to the Home Screen.
Verify all settings have been restored to default values as per UI Spec.
expected: All settings are restored to default values as per UI Spec.
